blockers.title: Normal certificate issuance does not create the required notification
blockers.evidence: Spec E12 requires a notification when a certificate is issued. The shared issuer inserts the certificate and audit row only at convex/lib/certificates.ts:49-94. The normal issuance paths call it directly from activation at convex/lib/activation.ts:45-46, migrated claim at convex/members.ts:899-904, and guardian confirmation at convex/guardians.ts:651-653, so those members receive no certificate_issued notification. The only notification path is the fallback ensureMyMembershipCertificate mutation at convex/certificates.ts:85-101, which does not run when the normal path already created the cert.
blockers.required_fix: Move the first-issuance notification into the shared issueMembershipCertificate path, or have every normal caller notify only when a new certificate row was created. Add tests for join activation, migrated claim, and guardian-confirmed youth issuance.

blockers.title: Unknown-age members can see and RSVP to youth events
blockers.evidence: Stage 0 says restricted_unknown is the safety default until DOB is confirmed and is restricted from high-consequence surfaces. The under-18 vault note grants youth-appropriate content to confirmed minors, with anything else case-by-case. Code treats restricted_unknown exactly like minor for events at convex/events.ts:43-49, so listEvents exposes youth events at convex/events.ts:183-184 and rsvp allows booking them at convex/events.ts:272-277. The UI also tells unknown-age members that sessions for members under 18 appear for them at src/portal/views/EventsView.tsx:21-43.
blockers.required_fix: Do not route restricted_unknown accounts into youth events. Keep them out of event booking until DOB is confirmed or add an explicit audited approval path from the vault. Add regression tests proving restricted_unknown cannot list, view, or RSVP to youth events.

non_blocking_notes: npm test and npm run check could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted to write generated temp files.

spec_compliance.criterion: E12 notifications written on certificate issued
spec_compliance.evidence: Normal certificate issuance paths create certificates without inserting notifications.
restricted_unknown members are allowed into youth event listing and RSVP paths.

spec_compliance.criterion: Brand locks for added member-facing strings
spec_compliance.evidence: No member-facing em dash blocker found in the reviewed diff.

spec_compliance.criterion: Admin/member authorization gates sampled in the diff
spec_compliance.evidence: Admin functions reviewed use requireAdmin/requireSuperAdmin, and member functions sampled resolve the member from auth rather than client-supplied member ids.

summary: The slice cannot ship until certificate-issued notifications are wired into the real issuance paths and unknown-age members are no longer allowed to book youth events.
